title: Juzzian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Juzzians''' were an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] race from the [[Juzzia system/Legends|Juzzia system]] with cone-shaped bodies and many [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. There were both sedentary and [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]]-hopping Juzzians. They made [[colony marker]]s and presumably developed the [[Juzzian armlock]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
